release_notes: Microsoft Store update note: if the update fails, fully close Icarus and start the update again in the Store. The Store update is on Icarus's current version (3.2.3).
list_of_features: Custom map colors with support for custom profiles
More accurate drawing (lines no longer change after you finish drawing)
Improved size accuracy of all abilities
You can drag the spike now
Replaced the activity bar with a quick switcher for easier strategy switching
Added keybind indicators for many actions so behavior is more obvious
